validation:is-not-blank-string.message: Product category name cannot be blank.

try.doc:name: TRY: Create Product Category in Salesforce

salesforce:create.doc:name: CREATE: Product Category in Salesforce

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "[$(toString(now()))] Product category created: $(write(payload, 'application/json'))"]
logger.doc:name: INFO: Product Category Created

try.doc:name: TRY: Query Product Category by UUID

salesforce:query.doc:name: QUERY: Product Category by UUID
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT UUID__c, Name, Description__c FROM ProductCategory__c WHERE UUID__c = ':categoryUuid' LIMIT 1

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "Raw Query Result: $(write(payload, 'application/json'))"]
logger.doc:name: INFO: Query Product Category by UUID Result

try.doc:name: TRY: Upsert Product Category by UUID

salesforce:upsert.doc:name: UPSERT: Product Category by UUID

try.doc:name: TRY: Delete Product Category by UUID

salesforce:query.doc:name: QUERY: Lookup Category by UUID
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id FROM ProductCategory__c WHERE UUID__c = ':categoryUuid' LIMIT 1

raise-error.doc:name: RAISE: Delete Failed Error
raise-error.description: Was unable to delete the product category

logger.doc:name: INFO: Deleted Category
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "[$(toString(now()))] Product category deleted: $(vars.id)"]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var q = attributes.queryParams.q default "" var limit = attributes.queryParams.limit default 25 var offset = attributes.queryParams.offset default 0
var fieldsToSearch = [ "Name" ]
var likeClause = "(" ++ ((fieldsToSearch map (f) -> "$(f) LIKE '%$(q)%'") joinBy " OR ") ++ ")"
var baseQuery = "SELECT UUID__c, Name, Description__c FROM ProductCategory__c"
var extendedQuery = if (!isEmpty(q)) "$(baseQuery) WHERE $(likeClause)" else baseQuery --- extendedQuery ++ " LIMIT $(limit) OFFSET $(offset)"

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "Raw Query Result: $(write(payload, 'application/json'))"]
logger.doc:name: INFO: Query Categories Result
